return(function(g,E,Y,r,Z,b,i,W,x,z,l,V,H,s,k,P,C,X,p,a,q,f)H,q,X,W,C,a,k,f,p,P,x,s,l,V,z=function(g,c)local E=k(c)local Y=function(Y,r)return p(g,{Y;r},c,E)end return Y end,function(g,c)local E=k(c)local Y=function(Y,r,Z)return p(g,{Y,r;Z},c,E)end return Y end,function(g)local c,p=-644869+644870,g[-317490+317491]while p do W[p],c=W[p]-(-393273+393274),c+(603673-603672)if return(X(12449187-153093,{}))(E(i))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[c(-192466+148612)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
